meta.title: EvoMarket - Digital Agency in Rabat, Morocco
meta.description: EvoMarket is a digital agency in Rabat specializing in digital marketing, content creation, web & mobile development and social media management.

hero.description: EvoMarket is a digital agency based in Rabat, specializing in transforming your ideas into high-performing digital experiences.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: Complete digital solutions to propel your business towards success.

socialMedia.title: Social Media Management
socialMedia.description: We take full charge of your social media presence — from strategy and content planning to daily publishing, community management, and performance reporting. We create tailored content for Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and TikTok to keep your brand visible, consistent, and engaging across every platform.

contentCreation.title: Content Creation
contentCreation.description: Our creative team produces high-quality content that tells your brand's story: professional photo & video shoots, motion graphics, Reels, Stories, and branded visuals. We also provide copywriting in French, Arabic, and English to ensure your message resonates with every audience.

webDev.title: Web Development
webDev.description: We design and develop fast, modern, and fully custom websites — from elegant showcase sites to complex web applications. Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, every site we deliver is responsive, SEO-optimized, and engineered to convert visitors into clients.

mobileApp.title: Mobile Development
mobileApp.description: We build cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android that combine performance with intuitive design. Whether you need a client portal, an e-commerce app, or a fully custom solution, we deliver polished mobile experiences that your users will love.

digitalMarketing.title: Digital Marketing & Strategy
digitalMarketing.description: We drive real, measurable results through targeted digital strategies: SEO, Google Ads, Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram), and in-depth campaign analytics. We manage your entire advertising ecosystem — continuously optimizing campaigns and maximizing your return on investment.

training.title: Team Training
training.description: We offer professional in-person training workshops for your teams, covering content creation, digital marketing strategy, accounting management, video editing, and professional filming techniques. Our expert-led sessions are designed to upskill your staff and empower them to handle your digital presence independently.
training.note: This service is only available for companies based in Morocco, as all sessions are conducted in person.

process.title: How we work
process.description: An example structure of a full-stack website with multi-functionalities — from strategy to launch.

step1.title: Discovery & Strategy
step1.description: In-depth analysis of your objectives, audience and competitors to develop a winning strategy.

step2.title: Design & Prototyping
step2.description: Creation of UI/UX mockups and interactive prototypes to validate the concept before development.

step3.title: Development & Testing
step3.description: Development with modern technologies, rigorous testing and performance optimization.

step4.title: Launch & Support
step4.description: Deployment, team training and ongoing support to ensure success.

portfolio.title: Recent Projects
portfolio.description: A glimpse of our work in Website development and content creation across diverse sectors.

about.title: Your trusted digital partner
about.description: EvoMarket is more than just a digital agency. We are your strategic partner, dedicated to transforming your vision into digital reality. Rabat, we combine local expertise with international standards.
about.mission: Our mission is to make digital accessible and performant for every Moroccan business.

aboutPage.metaDescription: Discover EvoMarket, your trusted digital agency based in Rabat, Morocco. Our story, our team and our values.
aboutPage.heroTitle: The agency that evolves your digital presence
aboutPage.heroDescription: EvoMarket was born from a passion for digital and a clear ambition: to make powerful digital solutions accessible to every Moroccan business. Based in Rabat, we combine creativity, technology and local expertise.
aboutPage.storyTitle: A passionate team at your service
aboutPage.storyP1: EvoMarket is a full-service digital agency founded by a passionate team of creatives, developers and strategists. Since our founding, we have been guiding Moroccan businesses through their digital transformation — from strategy to launch.
aboutPage.storyP2: Whether you are a startup looking to build your online presence, or an established business seeking to accelerate your digital growth, we have the skills and energy to propel you towards your goals.
aboutPage.valuesDescription: What sets us apart and makes us your best digital partner.
aboutPage.value1Desc: We deeply understand the Moroccan market, its specificities and opportunities. Your business benefits from a strategy tailored to your local context.
aboutPage.value2Desc: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS — we use the most powerful technologies to guarantee you fast, secure and scalable solutions.
aboutPage.value3Desc: Every action we take is ROI-oriented. We measure, analyze and continuously optimize to maximize the impact of your digital investments.
aboutPage.value4Desc: From strategy to launch, and well beyond. EvoMarket is your long-term partner: we train your teams, ensure follow-up and evolve with you.
aboutPage.ctaDescription: Let's discuss your project and build together the digital strategy that will propel you towards success.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.description: Our clients' satisfaction is our greatest reward.
